category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an AI-powered command-line workflow tool for developers; official docs call Qwen Code an agentic coding tool in the terminal.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub repository use the display name Qwen Code; source_facts.name is qwen-code.
docs_sources: Official QwenLM GitHub Pages documentation provides the Qwen Code overview and user docs; official repository README is also available.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository https://github.com/QwenLM/qwen-code.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an AI-powered command-line workflow tool; official docs describe terminal-based codebase and automation workflows.
